html:
Rope is a Refined Item crafted with 3 Cut Grass. A Science Machine is required to unlock the recipe. Rope can be used to craft various Tools, Survival items, and Weapons. It can also be used to refuel a Fire Pit by 90 seconds or a Campfire by 45 seconds.

Contents

  • 1 Downloadable Content
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Downloadable Content

The Reign of Giants DLC adds several crafting recipes that require Rope. It also adds the ability to receive Rope from Tumbleweeds.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Rope can also be acquired by Hammering Crates.

In the Hamlet DLC, Rope can also be acquired by Hammering A Smashing Pot. Both kinds of Hanging Vines drop one, too.

Trivia

  • In the old research system, the research cost of a Rope was 30.
  • In older versions of the game, rope used to fuel fires with as much energy as boards would (360/180 seconds). However, that was fixed to give the same amount as 3 cut grass.

Gallery

–Wortox
“For tying, florpt.”
–Wurt
“An essential part of any adventuring kit.”
–Walter
“I'm sure I'll find some use for it sooner or later.”
–Wanda

'''Rope''' is a [[Refined]] [[Item]] crafted with 3 [[Cut Grass]]. A [[Science Machine]] is required to unlock the recipe. Rope can be used to craft various [[Tools]], [[Survival|Survival items]], and [[Weapons]]. It can also be used to [[Fire#Fuel|refuel]] a [[Fire Pit]] by 90 seconds or a [[Campfire]] by 45 seconds.

== {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
The ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC adds several crafting recipes that require Rope. It also adds the ability to receive Rope from [[Tumbleweed]]s.

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, Rope can also be acquired by [[Hammer]]ing [[Crate]]s.

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Rope can also be acquired by [[Hammer]]ing [[A Smashing Pot]]. Both kinds of [[Hanging Vine]]s drop one, too.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* In the old research system, the [[Research points list|research cost]] of a Rope was 30.
